name: com.meertrack/mcp-server
title: Meertrack
description: Competitive intelligence - track what competitors ship each week. 8 tools, 3 prompt workflows.

environmentVariables.name: MEERTRACK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Meertrack production API key (mt_live_…). Mint at Settings → API Keys.

environmentVariables.name: MEERTRACK_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional upstream override; defaults to https://api.meertrack.com/v1.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Either `Bearer mt_live_…` (static API key) or an OAuth 2.1 access token obtained via the authorization server advertised at `/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource`.
